title: * Studio: > ~$5,846/mo (Exempt)
content:
* Studio: > ~$5,846/mo (Exempt)
* 1-Bedroom: > ~$6,005/mo (Exempt)
* 2-Bedroom: > ~$6,742/mo (Exempt)
* 3-Bedroom: > ~$8,413/mo (Exempt)
(Source: Derived from HUD 245% FMR calculations)
B. New Jersey: The "Pre-War" Luxury Trap
NJ's Lead-Safe Certification law applies to all rental properties built before 1978.
* The Logic: Many "luxury" assets in NJ are historic estates (Montclair, Summit, Rumson) or Gold Coast brownstones (Hoboken). These are high-value but high-risk.
* The Opportunity: Unlike new construction luxury condos (which are exempt), these historic assets require strict compliance. She becomes the expert who manages this "historic asset risk" for them.
3. Product Definition: "The Portfolio Shield" App
This is the groundbreaking app idea. It is not a generic CRM. It is a Compliance & Asset Intelligence Dashboard for High-Net-Worth clients.
Target User: Landlords/Investors with $5M+ in real estate assets (5-50 units).
Platform: Web-based (desktop for deep work) + Mobile (for status checks).
